title: 126. Word Ladder II
question:
Given two words (beginWord and endWord), and a dictionary's word list, find all shortest transformation sequence(s) from beginWord to endWord, such that:

  1. Only one letter can be changed at a time
  2. Each transformed word must exist in the word list. Note that beginWord is not a transformed word.

Note:

  • Return an empty list if there is no such transformation sequence.
  • All words have the same length.
  • All words contain only lowercase alphabetic characters.
  • You may assume no duplicates in the word list.
  • You may assume beginWord and endWord are non-empty and are not the same.

Example 1:

Input:
beginWord = "hit",
endWord = "cog",
wordList = ["hot","dot","dog","lot","log","cog"]

Output:
[
  ["hit","hot","dot","dog","cog"],
  ["hit","hot","lot","log","cog"]
]

Example 2:

Input:
beginWord = "hit"
endWord = "cog"
wordList = ["hot","dot","dog","lot","log"]

Output: []

Explanation: The endWord "cog" is not in wordList, therefore no possible transformation.
code: class Solution(object):\u000A    def findLadders(self, beginWord, endWord, wordList):\u000A        \u0022\u0022\u0022\u000A        :type beginWord: str\u000A        :type endWord: str\u000A        :type wordList: List[str]\u000A        :rtype: List[List[str]]\u000A        \u0022\u0022\u0022\u000A        from collections import defaultdict\u000A        n \u003D len(beginWord)\u000A        adj_dict \u003D defaultdict(list)\u000A        for word in wordList:\u000A            for i in range(n):\u000A                adj_dict[word[:i] + \u0027?\u0027 + word[i + 1:]].append(word)\u000A        bfs \u003D [([beginWord], beginWord)]\u000A        visited \u003D {beginWord}\u000A        while bfs:\u000A            lvl_visited \u003D set()\u000A            bfs \u003D [(path + [adj], adj)\u000A                   for path, cur in bfs\u000A                   for i in range(n)\u000A                   for adj in adj_dict[cur[:i] + \u0027?\u0027 + cur[i + 1:]]\u000A                   if adj not in visited and (lvl_visited.add(adj) is None)]\u000A            visited.update(lvl_visited)\u000A            final_path \u003D [path for path, word in bfs if word \u003D\u003D endWord]\u000A            if final_path: return final_path\u000A        return []
